summary.headline: Pass 7 — 4 test failures fixed, 287+ tests verified, self-scan 17/17

fixes_applied.issue: 429 rate-limit failures + stale scanner parser count (19 vs 31)
fixes_applied.fix: Added _request() retry helper with exponential backoff on 429; updated scanner count assertion from 19 to 31

fixes_applied.issue: Module-level test() calls executed during pytest import, causing 20 rate-limit failures
fixes_applied.fix: Refactored module-level test() calls into __main__ guard; added _req() retry helper for 429 responses

fixes_applied.issue: test_large_findings_batch timeout (30s) too short for threat enrichment (~38s)
Dynamic ComplianceAutoMapper produced only 3 controls when findings existed, but tests expected >=10
fixes_applied.fix: Merge dynamic controls with fallback controls so all framework controls are always present; dynamic controls take precedence, remaining fallback controls added as 'not_assessed'

broader_repository.note: Run during pass 7 with 30s timeout, maxfail=50

remaining_known_flaky.reason: Order-dependent; passes in isolation, fails when TestClient app state is polluted by prior tests
Intermittent; passes in isolation and in focused runs, fails rarely in broader suite

next_actions: Investigate test_gap_router copilot chat flakiness (TestClient state isolation)
Add conftest fixture to reset app state between test modules
Consider adding FIXOPS_DISABLE_RATE_LIMIT=1 to conftest for all live-server tests
